title: Smoky Spicy Ethiopian Chicken Doro Wot
description: A peppery and flavorful one-pot Ethiopian dish featuring chicken and breadcrumbs, with a smoky and spicy twist, lacto-vegetarian-friendly by substituting chicken with portobello mushrooms if needed.

ingredients.name: boneless chicken thighs
ingredients.notes: or portobello mushrooms for vegetarian option

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add berbere spice, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Add breadcrumbs and stir to combine.
Add 1 cup of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 25 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
